entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium that influences crop traits and hosts microorganisms

entities.name: CROP TRAITS
entities.description: Quantitative and qualitative characteristics of crops

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall condition of a person's body and mind

entities.name: MICROBES
entities.description: Microscopic organisms living in the soil

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A severe abiotic stress caused by lack of water, resulting from climate change

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living factors that cause stress to organisms

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Agricultural crops and other vegetation

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Essential processes and services provided by soil microorganisms

entities.name: ENZYMES
entities.description: Biological catalysts produced by microbes

entities.name: OXIDOREDUCTASES
entities.description: A class of enzymes that catalyze oxidation-reduction reactions

entities.name: HYDROLASES
entities.description: A class of enzymes that catalyze the hydrolysis of a chemical bond

entities.name: DEHYDROGENASES
entities.description: A class of enzymes that catalyze the removal of hydrogen

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: An enzyme that decomposes hydrogen peroxide

entities.name: UREASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of urea

entities.name: PHOSPHATASES
entities.description: Enzymes that remove phosphate groups from molecules

entities.name: GLUCOSIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of glucosidic bonds

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth

entities.name: PLANT PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate at which plants produce biomass or yield

entities.name: ECONOMIC LOSS
entities.description: Financial deficit resulting from decreased agricultural productivity

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique for making precise changes to the DNA of an organism

entities.name: MOLECULAR ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of biological molecules, including metagenomics and transcriptomics

entities.name: METAGENOMICS
entities.description: The study of genetic material recovered directly from environmental samples

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome—the complete set of RNA transcripts

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of chemical processes involving metabolites
